ar.tool.description: Get the status of one Matter device and return a JSON or text summary.
ar.param.dev.description: Matter device ID to look up. Required identifier.
ar.err.config_missing: Matter device data is missing. Set {env_json} or {env_file} for devices, controllers, or bridges.
